'''dhafusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:featurality|featurality]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-f-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:featurality|featurality]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhafusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæfisith|dhæfisith]] || [[word:dhæfisij|dhæfisij]] || [[word:dhæfisish|dhæfisish]] || [[word:dhæfisi|dhæfisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhafufusuth|dhafufusuth]] || [[word:dhafufusuj|dhafufusuj]] || [[word:dhafufusush|dhafufusush]] || [[word:dhafufusu|dhafufusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhafusuth|dhafusuth]] || [[word:dhafusuj|dhafusuj]] || [[word:dhafusush|dhafusush]] || [[word:dhafusu|dhafusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhafufsuth|dhafufsuth]] || [[word:dhafufsuj|dhafufsuj]] || [[word:dhafufsush|dhafufsush]] || [[word:dhafufsuf|dhafufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhafusuthu|dhafusuthu]] || [[word:dhafusuju|dhafusuju]] || [[word:dhafusushu|dhafusushu]] || [[word:dhafusuku|dhafusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhafusuth|dhafusuth]] || [[word:dhafusuj|dhafusuj]] || [[word:dhafusush|dhafusush]] || [[word:dhafusu|dhafusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhafusuthul|dhafusuthul]] || [[word:dhafusujul|dhafusujul]] || [[word:dhafusushul|dhafusushul]] || [[word:dhafusukul|dhafusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhafusuthuthu|dhafusuthuthu]] || [[word:dhafusujuju|dhafusujuju]] || [[word:dhafusushushu|dhafusushushu]] || [[word:dhafusuku|dhafusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhafusuthun|dhafusuthun]] || [[word:dhafusujun|dhafusujun]] || [[word:dhafusushun|dhafusushun]] || [[word:dhafusukun|dhafusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhafusuthuoro|dhafusuthuoro]] || [[word:dhafusujuoro|dhafusujuoro]] || [[word:dhafusushuoro|dhafusushuoro]] || [[word:dhafusukuoro|dhafusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
